texto: If you're worried that you won't know someone in a few years, you should start living in the present and enjoy the people who are around you now and when the time comes for both of you to part ways... remember that it was a privilege and honor to be part of their life's - even if it was for such a short time.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Tiffany Walker sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “If you're worried that you won't know someone in a few years, you should start living in the pres…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, friends, worried, útil em momentos de termino e vida.

frase_original: If you're worried that you won't know someone in a few years, you should start living in the present and enjoy the people who are around you now and when the time comes for both of you to part ways... remember that it was a privilege and honor to be part of their life's - even if it was for such a short time.
